Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds an: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security by requiring a one-time verification code from your authenticator app during login.
Disabling 2FA will remove this additiona: Disabling 2FA will remove this additional security measure, making your account more vulnerable to unauthorized access.
Enhance your account security by enablin: Enhance your account security by enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). This ensures that only you can access your account, even if your password is compromised.
Follow these steps to enable 2FA on your: Follow these steps to enable 2FA on your account:
Step 1: Download the Google Authenticato: Step 1: Download the Google Authenticator app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Step 2: Scan the QR code above using you: Step 2: Scan the QR code above using your Google Authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
